metadata.name: Real Time Machine
metadata.description: Really speed up the whole game! Including but not limited to walking, slot machines, beggars, and even Placenta! Hold slash key (/) for 4x speed up. Press period (.) to adjust rate up for 1.4x, comma (,) to decrease for 1.4x. Have a maximum of 64x speed up! Will affect in-game timer as well, also affect the Chariot card duration with blood donation machine, truely fair speed up. Also speed the player as well as enemies up (if any in room) for people who'd like to challenge. No bug in boss rush like [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2617557401]Time Machine[/url] does. You may change the key bindings with [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3701683951]Mod Config Menu[/url]. NOTE: Having [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3033763718]IsaacSocket[/url] would allows this mod to work even well (e.g. able to supporing 0.5x slow down, support fair Damocles and so on). Make sure you have installed both IsaacSocket mod as well as IsaacSocket client following instructions in its home page. 真正加快整个游戏速度！包括但不限于走路、老虎机、乞丐，甚至胎盘！ 按住斜杠键（/）可加速4倍。轻按句号（.）可增加1.4倍速，逗号（,）可减少1.4倍速。最高可达64倍速！ 也会影响游戏内计时器，也影响卖血时战车卡持续时间，所以是完全公平的加速。 也会影响玩家和敌人的速度（如果房间内有的话），方便给主播打点播挑战自我。 不会像[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2617557401]Time Machine[/url]那样在Boss Rush中出现bug。 您可以使用[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3701683951]Mod Config Menu[/url]更改按键绑定。 注意：同时具有[url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3033763718]IsaacSocket[/url]可以使本模组工作得更好（例如可以支持0.5倍减速，支持达摩剑判定等）。确保您已按照该模组主页中的说明安装了IsaacSocket模组并启动了IsaacSocket客户端。
